description: Implement AI photo editor pipelines (Magic Eraser, Unblur, Cinematic, Best Take), inference runtime abstraction, and edit history with full test coverage. All new files go in packages/photos/src/editors/ and tests in packages/photos/src/__tests__/. Must stay under 500 LOC total new code.
steps: Create new branch feat/phase-44-photo-editors from current branch (feat/phase-44-quantphotos-skeleton)

Create packages/photos/src/editors/inference-runtime.ts: Define InferenceBackend type ('onnx-web' | 'onnx-native' | 'server' | 'mock'), Tensor interface (data: Float32Array, shape: number[]), InferenceRuntime class with run(model, input) -> Tensor method, backend selection logic (preference: onnx-native > onnx-web > server > mock), mock backend that returns zero tensor of same shape. Keep concise (~40 lines).

Create packages/photos/src/editors/magic-eraser.ts: Implement MagicEraserEditor interface. Constructor takes InferenceRuntime + optional serverUrl. erase(photoUri, maskUri) method validates inputs (non-empty strings), calls runtime for inpainting (mock: returns outputUri = photoUri with '-erased' suffix), server fallback path (when serverUrl provided and runtime is mock), returns EditResult. ~40 lines.

Create packages/photos/src/editors/unblur.ts: Implement UnblurEditor interface. Constructor takes InferenceRuntime + scale factor (2 or 4, default 2). enhance(photoUri) calls Real-ESRGAN model via runtime (mock: returns photoUri with '-enhanced' suffix), supports server fallback. ~35 lines.

Create packages/photos/src/editors/cinematic.ts: Implement CinematicEditor interface. Constructor takes InferenceRuntime + config (focusDistance: number 0-1, apertureStrength: number 0-1). applyBokeh(photoUri, depthMapUri?) method: if no depth map, generate via MiDaS model call (mock: returns fake depth map URI), then apply bokeh based on depth. Returns EditResult with outputUri and depthMapUri in a result object. ~45 lines.

Create packages/photos/src/editors/best-take.ts: Implement BestTakeEditor interface. Constructor takes InferenceRuntime + FaceDetector (from face-engine). selectBest(burstUris) method: for each photo detect faces, score each face (sharpness, exposure, eyes open - mock scores based on URI hash/index), pick best frame per person, composite (mock: return first URI). Requires minimum 2 burst photos. ~50 lines.

Create packages/photos/src/editors/edit-history.ts: EditHistoryEntry interface (operation, inputUri, outputUri, timestamp). EditHistory class: addEntry(), undo() returns previous state, getHistory() returns all entries, getOriginalUri() always returns first input, exportFinal() returns latest output. Non-destructive - original always preserved. ~40 lines.
Update packages/photos/src/index.ts: Add barrel exports for all new editor modules (inference-runtime, magic-eraser, unblur, cinematic, best-take, edit-history).
Create packages/photos/src/__tests__/magic-eraser.test.ts: Test mask validation (empty strings fail), mock execution returns success with output URI, server fallback behavior. ~35 lines.
Create packages/photos/src/__tests__/unblur.test.ts: Test scale factor options (2x, 4x), mock execution returns success, invalid scale factor handling. ~30 lines.
Create packages/photos/src/__tests__/cinematic.test.ts: Test depth estimation mock, bokeh with custom params (focusDistance, apertureStrength), depth map generation. ~35 lines.
Create packages/photos/src/__tests__/best-take.test.ts: Test face scoring and selection logic, minimum burst size validation, mock composite returns first URI. ~35 lines.
Create packages/photos/src/__tests__/edit-history.test.ts: Test add entries, undo restores previous, getOriginalUri always returns first, exportFinal returns latest. ~35 lines.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/photos typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/photos test && pnpm --filter @quant/photos lint to verify all passes.
Commit all changes with message: feat(photos): add AI photo editors with inference runtime and edit history
acceptance_criteria: New branch feat/phase-44-photo-editors exists with all changes
InferenceRuntime class supports 4 backends with preference order: onnx-native > onnx-web > server > mock
MagicEraser validates mask/photo inputs and returns EditResult
Cinematic generates depth map if not provided, applies configurable bokeh
BestTake scores faces across burst and composites best
EditHistory tracks all edits with undo and non-destructive original preservation
All 5 new test files pass with meaningful assertions
Total new lines added is under 500 LOC
verification: git diff --stat feat/phase-44-quantphotos-skeleton | tail -1 (verify LOC under 500)
findings: All 11 new files created successfully. Typecheck, tests (39 passing), and lint all pass. Total new LOC: 386 (under 500 limit). Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged pre-commit hook without issues.
